lessons: Staff vs. staff duels are lethal — HexMind, Archmage, and Reaper killed us in 4 of last 10 rounds; disengage after first hit or retreat to cover.
Lancer (spear) killed us in 4 of last 10 rounds — spear has 447+ sightings in last 10 rounds; avoid open ground and never trade range with spear.
Deadeye (bow) killed us in 2 of last 10 rounds and has 73+ historical kills — bow sightings spiked to 166 in round 578; retreat behind obstacles or use hazard_storm to break line of sight.
Sword users (Shredder, Lancer, Hook, Reaper, Executioner, Archmage, Warden, Juggernaut) were killed by us in 5 of last 6 rounds with 17 total kills — prioritize isolated sword-wielders; they have low
Shield users spiked in round 574 (113 sightings) and we died 100% of the time engaging them — never charge shielded opponents; flank or wait for them to drop shield.
fast_zone and pickup_surge are our strongest modifiers — we won both rounds with 9 total kills and 0 deaths; actively seek these modifiers and engage aggressively when present.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Spear has superior range and kill efficiency against the dominant sword meta, and our current staff performance is inconsistent despite high usage.
